descriptionShort: Display case footage from the 2025 Richmond Sockeyes Hall of Fame banquet night event.
descriptionLong: Video showcasing the Sockeyes memorabilia display case at the 2025 banner-night / BC Hockey Hall of Fame reunion event on July 12, 2025. Likely features photographs, trophies, jerseys, and artifacts commemorating the 1987 Centennial Cup championship team and its legacy.
